CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(Status),
"Draft", IMAGE("/resource/orange_image", "Draft", 20, 20), "In Review", IMAGE("/resource/orange_image", "In Review", 20, 20), "Needs Review", IMAGE("/resource/orange_image", "Needs Review", 20, 20),
"Approved", IMAGE("/resource/green_image", "Approved", 20, 20), "Presented", IMAGE("/resource/green_image", "Presented", 20, 20), "Accepted", IMAGE("/resource/green_image", "Accepted", 20, 20),
"Rejected", IMAGE("/resource/red_image", "Rejected", 20, 20), "Denied", IMAGE("/resource/red_image", "Denied", 20, 20),
"" )
CustomField.label: Status Indicator
